tickets.title: Critical: Massive Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) Delay
tickets.description: The LCP is currently 17,089ms, which is significantly higher than the Google-recommended threshold of 2,500ms. This is a critical failure for Core Web Vitals that directly impacts SEO rankings and user retention.
tickets.impact: Search Engine Ranking and User Conversion
tickets.fix: Identify the hero image (likely the product image) and ensure it is not lazy-loaded. Use <link rel='preload' as='image'> for the LCP candidate. Reduce main-thread execution time by deferring non-critical JavaScript.

tickets.title: Eliminate Unused JavaScript (1.6MB)
tickets.description: There is approximately 1,639KB of unused JavaScript being loaded. High-impact files include 'radar.min.js' (83% unused) and '6507.js' (60% unused). This causes massive overhead and pushes TTI to over 37 seconds.
tickets.impact: Page Speed and Time to Interactive (TTI)
tickets.fix: Implement code-splitting to load only necessary JS for the product page. Audit and remove redundant vendor scripts or heavy SDKs (like Signals or Radar) if they aren't required for initial page functionality.

tickets.title: Reduce Total Blocking Time (TBT) and Long Tasks
tickets.description: Total Blocking Time is 2,081ms. Multiple long tasks are exceeding 300ms, specifically from 'index.js', 'signals-sdk-5.6.7.js', and 'react-18.js'. This makes the page feel frozen to users.
tickets.fix: Break up long-running JavaScript tasks using requestIdleCallback or Web Workers. Move non-essential scripts (tracking/analytics) to load after the window load event.

tickets.title: Shorten Meta Description and Page Title
tickets.description: The meta description length is 229 characters (standard is ~160) and the title length is 78 characters (standard is ~60). This leads to truncation in Search Engine Results Pages (SERPs).
tickets.fix: Rewrite the meta description to be under 160 characters and ensure the Page Title is under 60 characters to prevent truncation.

tickets.title: Consolidate Excessive Network Requests (342 total)
tickets.description: The page makes 342 network requests. A massive portion of these are third-party tracking pixels (Facebook, Bing, Pinterest, Adobe, etc.), which creates heavy network contention.
tickets.fix: Audit third-party tags. Use a Server-Side Tag Management solution to move tracking logic off the client-side browser, or implement strict loading sequences where trackers load only after user interaction.

tickets.title: Fix Missing Image Alt Attributes
tickets.description: Two images are missing alt attributes, which negatively impacts Accessibility and Image SEO.
tickets.fix: Identify the two images using the selector 'prism-image' and add descriptive alt text.

tickets.title: Resolve Geolocation and JS Console Errors
tickets.description: The site is throwing errors: 'Failed to fetch store via geolocation' and 'Unrecognized event name'. This suggests logic breaks in the frontend scripts.
tickets.fix: Debug store geolocation logic to handle denial of permissions gracefully and audit event names passed to the analytics layer to ensure they are defined.
